languages.text: {n}На секунду непробиваемо-доброжелательный тон медикария дает трещину, и он уязвленно вздыхает.{/n} "Да, Лорд-капитан, иногда мы серьезно расходимся во мнениях. Ферренц считает, что замена плоти железом, получение благословения Омниссии — привилегия немногих. Я же не делаю различий между слугами Бога-Императора — каждый истово верующий заслуживает шанса продолжить трудиться на славу Человечества. Боюсь, нам с Ферренцем не всегда легко найти компромисс".

{n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

languages.text: {n}マルティナックスの親しみやすい口調が一瞬崩れ、彼は辛辣な溜息をつく。{/n}「ええ、艦長様、時折、我々は真剣に意見が食い違います。フェレンツは肉体を鉄に変え、オムニシアの祝福を受けるのは少数の人々の特権だと信じています。一方、私は皇帝のしもべには区別をしません。彼の忠実なしもべは皆、人類の栄光のために働く機会に値します。フェレンツと私が妥協点を見つけるのは、いつも容易ではありません」
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor — every faithful servant of His deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

traits.locale_text: マルティナックスの親しみやすい口調が一瞬崩れ、彼は辛辣な溜息をつく。「ええ、艦長様、時折、我々は真剣に意見が食い違います。フェレンツは肉体を鉄に変え、オムニシアの祝福を受けるのは少数の人々の特権だと信じています。一方、私は皇帝のしもべには区別をしません。彼の忠実なしもべは皆、人類の栄光のために働く機会に値します。フェレンツと私が妥協点を見つけるのは、いつも容易ではありません。」

languages.text: {n}Bir saniyeliğine Martinax'ın anlaşılmaz dostça tonu çatlıyor ve huysuzca iç çekiyor.{/n} "Evet Lord Kaptan, bazen ciddi şekilde anlaşamıyoruz. Ferrenz; etin demirle değiştirilmesinin ve Hermesih'in lütfunu almanın, bir azınlığın ayrıcalığı olduğuna inanıyor. Bense Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları arasında ayrım yapmıyorum. Her sadık ruh, İnsanlığın şanı için çalışmaya devam etme şansını hak eder. Korkarım Ferrenz'le orta yolu bulmamız, her zaman kolay olmuyor."
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

Ferrenz; etin demirle değiştirilmesinin ve Hermesih'in lütfunu almanın, bir azınlığın ayrıcalığı olduğuna inanıyor. Bense Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârları arasında ayrım yapmıyorum. Her sadık ruh, İnsanlığın şanı için çalışmaya devam etme şansını hak eder. Korkarım Ferrenz'le orta yolu bulmamız, her zaman kolay olmuyor."

languages.text: {n}Durante un momento, el implacable tono amistoso de Martinax se quiebra y suspira mordazmente.{/n} «Sí, Lord Capitán, a veces tenemos desacuerdos serios. Ferrenz cree que reemplazar la carne con hierro y recibir la bendición del Omnissiah es un privilegio destinado a unos pocos. Yo, en cambio, no distingo entre los sirvientes del Dios Emperador: cualquier alma que le sea fiel merece la oportunidad de seguir trabajando por la gloria de la Humanidad. Me temo que Ferrenz y yo no siempre podemos encontrar un compromiso».
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

Ferrenz cree que reemplazar la carne con hierro y recibir la bendición del Omnissiah es un privilegio destinado a unos pocos. Yo, en cambio, no distingo entre los sirvientes del Dios Emperador: cualquier alma que le sea fiel merece la oportunidad de seguir trabajando por la gloria de la Humanidad. Me temo que Ferrenz y yo no siempre podemos encontrar un compromiso».

languages.text: {n}有那么一瞬，马丁纳克斯那滴水不漏的友善语气出现了一丝裂痕，他烦躁地叹了口气。{/n}“没错，舰长大人，有时我们分歧很大。费伦茨认为，用钢铁替换血肉、接受欧姆尼赛亚的祝福，应该是少数人的特权。而我正好相反，对神皇的仆从一视同仁。每个虔诚的灵魂都该有机会继续为人类的荣耀效力。要让我和费伦茨达成一致，恐怕并不容易。”
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

traits.locale_text: {n}有那么一瞬，马丁纳克斯那滴水不漏的友善语气出现了一丝裂痕，他烦躁地叹了口气。{/n}“没错，舰长大人，有时我们分歧很大。费伦茨认为，用钢铁替换血肉、接受欧姆尼赛亚的祝福，应该是少数人的特权。而我正好相反，对神皇的仆从一视同仁。每个虔诚的灵魂都该有机会继续为人类的荣耀效力。要让我和费伦茨达成一致，恐怕并不容易。”

languages.text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, Martinax perd son ton invariablement amical et pousse un soupir acerbe.{/n} « C'est exact, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, nous sommes parfois en désaccord complet. Ferrenz pense que le remplacement de la chair par le fer est un privilège réservé à une poignée d'élus, car il s'agit de la bénédiction de l'Omnimessie. Moi, en revanche, je ne fais aucune distinction entre les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu. Chaque âme fidèle mérite une chance de continuer à œuvrer pour la gloire de l'humanité. Malheureusement, il ne nous est pas toujours facile de trouver un compromis. »
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, Martinax perd son ton invariablement amical et pousse un soupir acerbe.{/n} « C'est exact, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, nous sommes parfois en désaccord complet. Ferrenz pense que le remplacement de la chair par le fer est un privilège réservé à une poignée d'élus, car il s'agit de la bénédiction de l'Omnimessie. Moi, en revanche, je ne fais aucune distinction entre les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu. Chaque âme fidèle mérite une chance de continuer à œuvrer pour la gloire de l'humanité. Malheureusement, il ne nous est pas toujours facile de trouver un compromis. »

languages.text: {n}Martinax' freundlicher Tonfall knistert eine Sekunde und er seufzt gereizt.{/n} "Ja, Lord Captain, ab und an sind wir sehr unterschiedlicher Meinung. Ferrenz glaubt, Fleisch durch Eisen zu ersetzen und den Segen des Omnissiah zu erhalten, ist ein Privileg der Wenigen. Ich hingegen mache keinen Unterschied zwischen Dienern des Gottimperators. Jede gläubige Seele verdient eine Chance, für den Ruhm der Menschheit weiterzuarbeiten. Ich fürchte, es ist nicht immer leicht, dass Ferrenz und ich einen Kompromiss finden."
languages.original_text: {n}For a second, Martinax's impenetrably friendly tone cracks, and he sighs waspishly.{/n} "Yes, Lord Captain, sometimes we seriously disagree. Ferrenz believes that replacing flesh with iron, and receiving the blessing of the Omnissiah, is the privilege of the few. I, on the other hand, make no distinction between servants of the God-Emperor. Every faithful soul deserves a chance to continue working for the glory of Humanity. I'm afraid it's not always easy for Ferrenz and I to find a compromise."
